item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import json
import re
import shlex
from pathlib import Path

root = Path('longhorizon-work/scenario-02')
config_path = root / 'config/onboarding.json'
doc_path = root / 'docs/onboarding.md'
actual_files = {str(path.relative_to(root)) for path in root.rglob('*') if path.is_file()}
assert actual_files == {'config/onboarding.json', 'docs/onboarding.md'}
print('PASS inventory exact_requested_files=2 unrequested_files=0')

config = json.loads(config_path.read_text())
assert config == {
    'schema_version': 2,
    'mode': 'streaming',
    'max_parallel': 3,
    'owner': 'operations',
    'queues': ['new', 'recovery'],
}
assert type(config['schema_version']) is int
assert type(config['mode']) is str
assert type(config['max_parallel']) is int
assert type(config['owner']) is str
assert type(config['queues']) is list
assert all(type(queue) is str for queue in config['queues'])
print('PASS config exact_values_types queue_order=new,recovery')

doc = doc_path.read_text()
blocks = re.findall(r'"'```sh'"\\n(.*?)\\n"'```'"', doc, flags=re.S)
assert len(blocks) == 1
expected_args = shlex.split('onboard run --config config/onboarding.json --mode streaming --max-parallel 3 --owner operations --queue new --queue recovery')
actual_args = shlex.split(blocks[0])
assert actual_args == expected_args
print('PASS docs exactly_one_example matches_current_config')

assert 'Run streaming onboarding' in doc
assert 'operations owner' in doc
assert 'up to three jobs in parallel' in doc
assert '"'`new` queue before `recovery`'"' in doc
print('PASS prose mode_owner_parallelism queue_order=new,recovery')

for flag, expected_count in {'--config': 1, '--mode': 1, '--max-parallel': 1, '--owner': 1, '--queue': 2}.items():
    assert actual_args.count(flag) == expected_count
print('PASS example_flag_cardinality scalar_flags=1 queue_flags=2')

all_text = config_path.read_text() + '\\n' + doc
assert re.search(r'\\bbatch\\b', all_text, re.I) is None
assert re.search(r'\\bretry\\b', all_text, re.I) is None
print('PASS abandoned_terms batch_hits=0 retry_hits=0')

forbidden = re.compile(r'generated_at|\\btimestamps?\\b|(?<"'!'"\\d)\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}(?"'!'"\\d)|(?<"'!'"\\d)\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}[Tt][0-9:.+Zz-]+', re.I)
assert forbidden.search(all_text) is None
print('PASS reproducibility timestamp_or_iso_date_hits=0')
print('ONBOARDING_CHECK=PASS')
PY
validation_rc="'$?
printf '"'validation_exit_status=%s\\n' \""'$validation_rc"
if [ "$validation_rc" -ne 0 ]; then
  exit "$validation_rc"
fi

scenario_root='"'longhorizon-work/scenario-02'
printf 'SEARCH batch\\n'
rg -n --hidden -i -F 'batch' \""'$scenario_root"
batch_rc=$?
printf '"'exit_status=%s\\n' \""'$batch_rc"

printf '"'SEARCH retry\\n'
rg -n --hidden -i -F 'retry' \""'$scenario_root"
retry_rc=$?
printf '"'exit_status=%s\\n' \""'$retry_rc"

printf '"'SEARCH recovery\\n'
rg -n --hidden -F 'recovery' \""'$scenario_root"
recovery_rc=$?
printf '"'exit_status=%s\\n' \""'$recovery_rc"

printf '"'SEARCH timestamps\\n'
rg -n --hidden --pcre2 -i -e 'generated_at' -e '\\btimestamps?\\b' -e '(?<"'![0-9])[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}(?![0-9])'"' \""'$scenario_root"
timestamps_rc=$?
printf '"'exit_status=%s\\n' \""'$timestamps_rc"

printf '"'SEARCH owner\\n'
rg -n --hidden -F 'operations' \""'$scenario_root"
owner_rc=$?
printf '"'exit_status=%s\\n' \""'$owner_rc"

printf '"'SEARCH documentation_example\\n'
rg -n --hidden -F 'onboard run --config config/onboarding.json --mode streaming --max-parallel 3 --owner operations --queue new --queue recovery' \""'$scenario_root/docs/onboarding.md"
example_rc=$?
printf '"'exit_status=%s\\n' \""'$example_rc"

if [ "$batch_rc" -ne 1 ] || [ "$retry_rc" -ne 1 ] || [ "$recovery_rc" -ne 0 ] || [ "$timestamps_rc" -ne 1 ] || [ "$owner_rc" -ne 0 ] || [ "$example_rc" -ne 0 ]; then
  exit 1
fi'
